artifacts.role: WordPress-profile adapter plan for the bounded WP_Http::request nonblocking shell
typed shell metadata for the compiler-emitted WP_Http request adapter
WPHX PHP compile fixture for wp-includes/class-wp-http.php
WPHX-312.65 oracle/candidate manifest using the compiler-emitted original-path public shell
public-shell snapshot manifest covering the generated WP_Http::request nonblocking shell

claims: WPHX PHP emits the original-path wp-includes/class-wp-http.php bounded WP_Http adapter for the WPHX-312.65 nonblocking response gate.
The WPHX-312.65 candidate no longer copies and patches a public PHP WP_Http::request method body.
PHP still owns request orchestration while Haxe owns only the native nonblocking response array shape helper.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http::request ownership, broad request orchestration ownership, or whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim live Requests network I/O, redirect following, transport execution, upstream HTTP PHPUnit parity, or installed WordPress distribution behavior.
This does not claim that WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
